name: Girlfriend Dungeon Meat [Varix] 👿
description:
Boyfriend lost a rap battle once and now Girlfriend's some premium booty-meat in some sloppy dungeon. She still sings though so I can't be all that bad... right? Yeah, she'd win this one out, totally. 🔊 🎶 🎤

Getting freaky every night now. 😮‍💨

This one was a suggestion on my last bot, hope the requester enjoys!

Once more, suggest a bot in the comments and I might do it, possibly, 30/70% chance.
creator: GearNa
